title: Poofy's Uncraftable Recipes+
description: This mod adds over 280+ crafting recipes to vanilla Minecraft!
body:
**Poofy's Uncraftable Recipes+:**

**If you showcase this mod, please credit me in the video by adding a link to the mod or a shoutout! It helps :)**

**JEI is _EXTREMELY_ recommended! Some crafting recipes are in the gallery!**

NOTICE: THIS MOD IS IN BETA AND SOME RECIPES ARE NOT AVAILABLE, IF YOU WANT TO REQUEST A RECIPE COMMENT AND I'LL ADD IT!.

This mod currently features over **280** crafting recipes for uncraftables like Gunpowder and Enderpearls and... The Nether Star??!

Features:

Every Single Spawn Egg is Available!

Every Music Disk is also available!

Recipes for multiple Mob drops and even a Elytra!

Every Recipe is designed to be progression friendly and balanced!

**If you liked this mod, consider supporting my goal on on Ko-fi 😄**

**If you play Roblox, consider testing my friend’s Roblox game by joining: https://www.roblox.com/games/5465638320**
